title: Certification by employers
doc_html:
§714.  Certification by employers

The provisions of R.S. 45:711 through 45:715 shall not apply to motormen or conductors possessing written evidence of their qualifications and length of service from their last employers, which qualification must not be less than set out in R.S. 45:711.
doc_text:
§714.  Certification by employers
The provisions of R.S. 45:711 through 45:715 shall not apply to motormen or conductors possessing written evidence of their qualifications and length of service from their last employers, which qualification must not be less than set out in R.S. 45:711.
